experience.title: Universidad de Santander—UDES
bullets: Advisor on food services for the XX Central American and Caribbean Games

skills_and_achievements: Specialist in food protection, GMP and HACCP implementation, internal auditing, and food-handler training; experienced with statistical quality tools, lactic acid bacteria and bacteriocins, and antimicrobial/biodegradable packaging. Research includes whey-protein films controlling Listeria monocytogenes on smoked salmon (CONICYT/FONDEF project), antimicrobial films for meat, and LAB-derived bacteriocins; contributions to Colombia’s national raw milk health profile and risk assessment for Listeria in cooked meats; presenter at industrial microbiology congresses; member of ACTA.
